value.found_quote: The Sora web and app experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026. The Sora API will be discontinued on September 24, 2026.
value.rationale: The page confirms that OpenAI did offer Sora (substantiating that the offering exists/existed), but it is explicitly described as discontinued — the web and app experiences were shut down on April 26, 2026, and the API is set to be discontinued on September 24, 2026. The lifecycle status is therefore 'sunset' (discontinued/shutting down), not 'active'.
